gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The guarded recursive core of [`emit_owned`]: identical traversal, but every recursive step"] # [doc = " charges `budget.try_enter()` (RAII-released on return) so the depth ceiling — not a host-stack"] # [doc = " overflow — always bounds a pathological input (RFC-0041 §4.0/§4.7)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The per-binder occurrence counts route through [`count_occurrences_inner`] (not the public"] # [doc = " [`count_occurrences`]): this function only ever runs inside [`emit_owned`]'s"] # [doc = " [`ensure_sufficient_stack`] closure, i.e. already on the deep worker stack, so re-entering the"] # [doc = " public wrapper here would needlessly spawn a fresh 256 MiB worker thread **per binder** — turning"] # [doc = " the already-`O(N²)` re-walk (§4.7 residual) into an `O(N)` **thread-spawn** multiplier too."] fn emit_owned_guarded (node : & Node , budget : & RecursionBudget) -> Result < RcNode , EmitError > { let _guard = budget . try_enter () ? , }) , Node :: Swap { src , target , policy , } => Ok (RcNode :: Swap { src : Box :: new (emit_owned_guarded (src , budget) ?) , target : target . clone () , policy : policy . clone () , }) , Node :: Construct { ctor , args } => Ok (RcNode :: Construct { ctor : ctor . clone () , args : emit_args (args , budget) ? , }) , Node :: Match { scrutinee , alts , default , } => { let rc_scrutinee = Box :: new (emit_owned_guarded (scrutinee , budget) ?) ; let mut rc_alts = Vec :: with_capacity (alts . len ()) ; for alt in alts { rc_alts . push (emit_alt (alt , budget) ?) ; } let rc_default = match default { Some (d) => Some (Box :: new (emit_owned_guarded (d , budget) ?)) , None => None , } ; Ok (RcNode :: Match { scrutinee : rc_scrutinee , alts : rc_alts , default : rc_default , }) } Node :: Lam { param , body } => { let k = count_occurrences_inner (param , body) ; let rc_body = emit_owned_guarded (body , budget) ? The"] # [doc = " per-binder occurrence/borrow analysis routes through the `_inner` helpers ([`count_occurrences_inner`],"] # [doc = " [`is_fully_borrowable_inner`], [`is_sole_owned_move_inner`], [`borrow_occurrences_inner`]) — **not**"] # [doc = " the public [`ensure_sufficient_stack`]-wrapping wrappers — because this function already runs on the"] # [doc = " deep worker stack (via [`emit_ann_toplevel`]), so re-entering a wrapper here would needlessly spawn a"] # [doc = " fresh worker thread **per binder** (the same reasoning as [`emit_owned_guarded`])."] fn emit_ann (node : & Node , ann : & Ann , budget : & RecursionBudget) -> Result < RcNode , EmitError > { let _guard = budget . try_enter () ? gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Emit each argument of an `Op`/`Construct` under the annotation context, short-circuiting on the"] # [doc = " first error. gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Emit one annotated match alternative. gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Whether `var`'s binding is a **sole-owned single move**: used **exactly once**, and that use is a"] # [doc = " **move** (not a borrow position).
